Advanced Sports Betting Software Features for Morocco Operators

AI-Powered Odds Engine

Automatically updates pre-match and live betting odds in real time using intelligent algorithms, ensuring accurate pricing and faster market reactions.

Live & In-Play Betting

Offer dynamic betting markets with live match statistics, instant odds updates, cash-out functionality, and real-time event tracking for higher player engagement.

Player Account Management (PAM)

Manage player registration, KYC verification, wallets, betting history, responsible gaming controls, bonuses, and loyalty programs from one centralized system.

Multi-Currency & Local Payment Integration

Support multiple currencies and integrate secure payment gateways, digital wallets, bank transfers, and cryptocurrency payment options for smooth transactions.

Bonus & Promotion Management

Create welcome bonuses, free bets, cashback offers, accumulator bonuses, referral rewards, and promotional campaigns through an easy-to-use admin panel.

CRM & Player Retention Tools

Increase customer retention with personalized promotions, automated email campaigns, push notifications, player segmentation, and loyalty rewards.

Real-Time Analytics & Business Intelligence

Track KPIs, betting volumes, revenue, player behavior, market performance, and financial reports through interactive dashboards for informed decision-making.

Multi-Tenant Admin Dashboard

Manage multiple sportsbook brands, agents, affiliates, betting markets, users, and transactions from a single back-office platform.

Affiliate & Agent Management System

Expand your sportsbook business with built-in affiliate tracking, commission management, referral reporting, and agent hierarchy management.
